calendar.matters: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME

ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Dec-05-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter Eric L. Throne. There being no appearance by the petitioner, the Court ordered the matter off calendar.
